name: G-9 sync with operator registries: pr-source-add source_class federal-financial-regulator routes to us-government/ per §17 G-9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" --github acme/repo --id sec-pr --source-class federal-financial-regulator --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s tree/us-government/sec-pr.yaml ] && echo federal_routed 1>&2
